entry.title: SAP GUI vs. VDI - Smartcard PIN entry on launch
entry.content:
Dear all,

has anyone encountered the issue of a windows for a smartcard PIN entry popping up when launching SAP GUI? Please refer to the screenshot attached.

Since recently (before, for more than a year, this issue did not occur), this window pops up when launching SAP GUI on a VDI. I don´t use any smart card and there is no such PIN set up. I can just cancel the window 2 times (without entering any PIN) and then SAP GUI starts. But since I execute some SAP GUI recordings on schedule automatically, closing the window manually does not resolve the issue for me.

I have been interacting with support for quite a while to resolve this and tried a lot of approaches (mostly, trying to disable the PIN entry and smartcard functionality), but nothing ever helped. I also re-installed SAP GUI multiple times and tried different versions without any success.

The only resolution proposed was to create a new VDI. I did that and on the first glance, I was able to launch SAP GUI on the new VDI without the window popping up. Then, I was on vacation for 2 weeks - and after that, the issue occured on the new VDI.

Meanwhile, when exploring the versioning information, I today found out that SAP GUI starts without the pop-up window on the old VDI again. The only change was that the old VDI was meanwhile stopped due to expiration and then extended. Not sure whether I can just rely on this as a solution - from the expirience with the new VDI, it seems like the issue can re-occur at any time.

Also, I have a colleague who uses a VDI for the very same purpose in the very same way and has never seen this issue.

My current versioning info for SAP GUI:

Local PC: File version 8000.1.7.1161, build 2234706, Patch level 7, 32bit (never saw this pop-up with any version)
Old VDI: File version 8000.1.7.1161, build 2234706, Patch level 7, 64bit (worked fine for a long time with some older SAP GUI version, then no up-to-date version I tried work, after expiration and extension works fine again)
New VDI: File version 8000.1.7.1161, build 2234706, Patch level 7, 64bit/32bit (whatever up-to-date version I try, both 32 and 64 bit, the issue occurs. After the initial set up, the 64 bit version worked fine, after a while not any more without any change to the VDI and SAP GUI)

So if anyone has encountered this issue - did you find any resolution for this? Or at least a reason why it occurs?

entry.title: Unlock the Potential of AI and Shape the Future: SAP Customer Engagement Initiative Cycle 2-2024
entry.content:
Are you ready to unlock the potential of AI and revolutionize your industry? Look no further! With SAP's cutting-edge AI technology, we're here to help you automate processes, make smarter decisions, and boost your business efficiency.

Imagine a world where vast amounts of data are analyzed in real-time, patterns are identified, and game-changing insights are generated. That's the power of SAP's AI capabilities. We offer industry-specific, tailor-made solutions that can take your business to new heights. Whether you're in customer experience, supply chain management, finance, or human resources, SAP has got you covered. Our AI offerings span across various areas, ensuring that you have the tools you need to thrive in today's digital landscape.

But here's the exciting part - you have the chance to be at the forefront of this AI revolution. By participating in our AI-focused SAP Customer Engagement Initiative projects, you can help shape the future of our AI capabilities and ensure they align perfectly with your business needs. We value your input and want to build solutions that drive your success.

So, what are you waiting for? Join us in harnessing the power of AI to drive digital transformation and achieve unparalleled business success. Together, let's bring the way businesses operate using AI to the next level. Register for our AI-focused SAP Customer Engagement Initiative projects today! But hurry up, registration closes on July 12, 2024. 

SAP S/4HANA & SAP S/4HANA Cloud

  • AI assistant for General Ledger Accountant
  • AI-based warehouse order streaming, task optimization and resource planning
  • Intelligent assistant capabilities for Project Systems in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition
  • Risk and Assurance Reporting supported by AI

SAP Business Technology Platform

  • Adaptive User Interface powered by GenAI
  • AI Agents - A Low-Code / No-Code Process Automation Innovation
  • Enterprise automation with SAP: Integrate - Identify - Automate
  • Improving the Admin's and Solution Architect's Experience on SAP BTP
  • SAP Business Technology Platform - Data Protection and Privacy services

AI

  • Automotive Industry: Explore AI Use Cases in SAP S/4HANA Cloud
  • Insights into SAP BTP AI Innovations

User Assistance

  • Support of generative AI in SAP Enable Now

SAP Concur

  • Concur Expense - "Expense Reimagined" Concept
  • SAP Concur Solutions - Joule (Digital Assistant)

SAP Learning

  • Protean - Revolutionize Learning with GenAI and Immersive Technologies

Others

  • SAP Cloud ALM or Implementation: Customer Engagement Council

Seize this opportunity to make your voices heard – register on influence.sap.com and be a part of the SAP Customer Engagement Initiative Cycle 2 in 2024! If you are also interested in other SAP Customer Engagement Initiative projects that are currently open for registration, check out the full list here.

Warm regards,

Your SAP Customer Engagement Initiative Team

Follow-up after registration: When you register for a project, you will be invited to an introductory call with the SAP project lead. At this point further participation is optional. Typically, all activities are governed by the Feedback Agreement with SAP.

entry.title: Re: G/L account used in CJ88
entry.content: Any G/L account which posts to a project must be configured in RA.  It can be set to "not considered" in the calculations but RA has to know what to do with the posting.

entry.title: Re: Position date Vacancy in storie report
entry.content:
Hello Jhonatan,

One alternative for you is to create and use a calculated column in your report for Position Object, and then calculate the difference in days between the start date of the Position and the current date, for example:

DAYS_BETWEEN([Position#Position#Start Date] ,CURRENTDATE() )

Please check "Using Stories in People Analytics" in case you need more information about how to create a calculated column.

Regards.

Thiago Eva

entry.title: Re: SAP IBP Formula similar to excel CEILING function
entry.content: Thank you for replying @riyazahmed_ca2. In the meantime I was able to work it out using the formula i mentioned in my first reply (IF(KF_A=0,0,IF(KF_A<=Attribute_B, Attribute_B,CEIL(KF_A/Attribute_B)*"Attribute_B"))

entry.title: Order Confirmation Failing on Managed Gateway For Spend & Network (Ariba CIG)
entry.content:
Hi,

We are currently performing integration of SAP Business Network and SAP S/4HANA (RISE with SAP). Product is 'SAP Business Network Commerce Automation, Foundation Option(Ariba DSN)'.

 

The issue is that the order confirmation gets failed on CIG with the following error:

Upon referring to the support link (Error: "Fault response received from ANXXXXXXXXXXX with ErrorCode: CIG-PLT-00676" (ariba.com) ), we checked the ERP transactions, and found the following message in t-code 'SRT_LOG':

All of the configuration have been performed in the S/4HANA system as well as Cloud Connector and the CIG as per the following guides:

  • S/4HANA - Global Settings: Configuring and Enabling SAP Integration Suite, Managed Gateway for Spend Management and SAP Business Network | SAP Help Portal
  • Managed Gateway (CIG): Configuring a SAP Integration Suite, Managed Gateway for Spend Management and SAP Business Network Project for SAP Ariba Solutions | SAP Help Portal
  • S/4HANA - Application Specific Settings: Order Confirmation | SAP Help Portal

Moreover, in CIG document validator, upon pasting the cXML received from SAP Business Network, following errors are observed:

  1. Source Content Schema Validation:

Step Summary:

Source Content Schema not available for Document : cXML - ConfirmationRequest - 1.2.061

2. Target Schema Validation:

Error Text
cvc-complex- Invalid content was found starting with element 'IDOCTYP'. One of '{TABNAM}' is expected., Line : 4, Column : 16

 

Please guide what could be the route cause and resolution for this.

 

Thanks

RISE with SAP #SAP Business Network SAP digital supplier network membership SAP Business Network for Procurement and SAP Business Network for Supply Chain SAP S/4HANA  SAP Integration Suite, managed gateway for spend management and SAP Business Network

entry.title: Re: A cycle is found in the calculation chain of the key...
entry.content:
Hi @riyazahmed_ca2, there was a small error in my formula for KF 3: as it is max (KF1, KF d (stored KF)). It using KF1 and not KF2.

However, KF1 is derived from KF2 at period -1. So what we would request IBP to do is to calculate starting Period CU and recalculate the KF week by week in a incremental way yet this does not seem to be possible, as IBP seems to need to know the values for all horizon before calculating the KF's. The Formula works fine in Excel, but Excel does not look at the whole cycle.

I have tried breaking up the Key Figures in one KF for current week and one for Future weeks, yet the cycle is still there. Even if we use a copy operator we are still calling values of same cycled key figures between periods.

I believe this is not possible ,therefore I have asked the business to reassess the KF requirements, in the meantime I will try once more using Local Members instead of calculated KF's, perhaps there's some hope there.

I thank you for the time spent on trying to solve this question

entry.title: Join Us for the 1° SAP Comunity Meetup in São Paulo
entry.content:
Olá a todos,

Junte-se a Nós para o Primeiro Encontro da Comunidade SAP em São Paulo

Estamos muito animados para anunciar o nosso primeiro "Encontro da Comunidade SAP" em São Paulo no dia 27 de Julho de 2024 de maio! Este evento é uma oportunidade para todos os profissionais SAP de Recife se reunirem, compartilharem as últimas atualizações e discutirem o crescimento da comunidade SAP na nossa cidade.

O evento acontecerá na Pizzaria Veridiana no Higienópolis.

  • Rua Dona Veridiana, 661 - Higienópolis
            São Paulo-SP

Esta reunião informal permitirá que você conheça e faça networking com outros entusiastas do SAP que estão fazendo contribuições significativas para os clientes parceiros de São Paulo.

É uma chance de se conectar, trocar ideias e construir uma comunidade local SAP mais forte.

Por favor, entrem em contato comigo pelo celular 019 99729-2220 

@RobertaFernande

entry.title: Display XML data for output forms in public cloud for forms displayed using Create Correspondence
entry.content:
Hi, 

We have code "#&&DOWNLOAD_FORM_DATA_XML&&#" that we can use to display the xml data for forms that are displayed using output configuration but there are few forms that are displayed via std. apps or create correspondence like FI forms, COA forms and so on

Do we have any way that we can check the xml data for these forms as well?

entry.title: How to Improve Query Performance in SAP Datasphere when working with remote tables
entry.content:
Hello Experts

We have been working with SAP Datasphere, trying to recreate models previously built in MS SQL Server.

Because of that we chose as our main data product the SQL Views. The model consists of building SQL Views upon other SQL Views built upon Remote Tables.

Due to our company politics, we can only access data remotely, no data has to be stored in the cloud. Our data strategy is federation only.

But because of that, we have been having some issues. When previewing data, we pass the 3 minutes given by the platform and we can't preview.

I read this blog for advice on improving query performance: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/8-ways-to-increase-your-query-performance-in-sap-datasphere-when-federating/ba-p/13521723 

We tried running in analytical mode, that I believe is the same as activating the OLAP hint for SQL View (we tried with just one view) and the results are not satisfactory. We still can't preview data. Do we have to enable the analytical mode in all our views to see the improvement? (Our views are built upon views)

I was thinking maybe if we turn on "In-Memory Storage" for the remote tables we use to creating the SQL Views it could improve, but would that work for remote tables?

Replication is not an option for us. Our remote tables come from SAP HANA OP, integration via DPAgent and SDI.

Are there other ways to improve performance?

Thanks in advance

Rebeca

entry.title: Re: Extract Delta Records from SAP ECC & CRM into Datasphere
entry.content: Hi Experts, any comment on this?

This tool adheres to the "clean core" principles?

Regards!

entry.title: Re: New SAP SuccessFactors App in the Microsoft Teams App Store and Deprecation of Legacy App Packag
entry.content: @VanessaLi  I see above the note that the legacy app will be deprecated "July 2024"  Do you have a more specific date of final deprecation?  I am working on my teams project plan for testing and installing the new app and would like to ensure I am scheduling completion prior to the deprecation.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content: I am a woman and a first-generation college graduate in Logistics and Supply Chain. Currently, I hold a SAP ERP Fundamentals certification, which has provided me with a solid foundation in the SAP ecosystem. I am eager to upskill myself and enhance my career by pursuing additional SAP certifications. The digital skills initiative by SAP Learning presents a fantastic opportunity for me to expand my knowledge and expertise, and I am enthusiastic about the chance to advance my career within the SAP ecosystem.  I am passionate about learning and committed to undergoing the rigorous study required for SAP certification. Thank you for considering my application.

entry.title: Version variance as calculated measure at the model level
entry.content:
Hello Community, 

It appears that SAC won’t allow us to create model based calculated measures  that compare actuals to budget version for example. To be specific, it would, but you get a zero or the total value of only one version because the measure can’t access the other version. Would there be any past discussions or documentation out there that can explain this limitation?  Sounds to me like a case for an influence ticket, but I'd like to share any toughts of this matter before submitting it. 

I do know how to get it done in a story, but there are reasons why that may not the best solution: 

A) Comments. I’d like to keep my variance comments at the model level and not incur the risk of losing them when someone, by mistake, updates the name of a story measure. Keeping all the comments only on regular measures is not always practical due to quantity of information that will need to be reviewed before you get to the section you need. 

B) Let’s think about an organization trying to implement SAC for Planning and would like to involve as many users as possible to use SAC (self-service to some extent), exposing users to standardized pre-built measures, can help with the adoption of the tool. 

 

P.s. I know I can set my Budget version as actual category, but that sounds like using the system incorrectly and no documentation provided as to what can be a limitation of doing that. 

Thank you!

entry.title: When Use MRBR in CDHDR input does not update in the TABLE: RSEG
entry.content: Tests were performed with various controlled scenarios using the MRBR transaction, it does not update the RSEG table, it does update the CDHDR,CDPOS tables, a Note 394370-Release blocked invoicesMRBR was found, the Reports mentioned in the note were executed without success

entry.title: Re: How do I add a job in IBP planner workspace?
entry.content: hi @Gupta_Vaishnavi. Have you checked here : https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_INTEGRATED_BUSINESS_PLANNING/abee3923ad4d4722b6f10b0fe6cf4cef/3347723d521d4069bc42800e792d9ef6.html?q=planner%20workspace ?

entry.title: Re: Table for Content of Codelist - Custom Field
entry.content:
For every custom field ( Code list ) added via custom fields app, a value table is created in the backend. The code and texts are stored in the value table. You can find the value table inside the domain.

Thanks,

Shyam

entry.title: Re: Same Value from Request to Base Planning Level
entry.content:
Hi @victor_hugodebastosleo ,

 

Try changing the key figure setup to :

Aggregation mode: Custom

Disaggregation mode: Copy Value

entry.title: Cloud platform connectivity policy template not getting applied
entry.content:
i was doing the learning journey " Expose Integration Flow Endpoint as API and Test the Flow", i noticed the policy template "Cloud_Platform_Connectivity" is not getting applied. I am able to find the template and click on apply, however its not getting applied to the API.

I checked the roles, and ran the boosters again - all came out clean. 
I tried another policy template and noticed that its getting applied, issue is only with the template above "Cloud_Platform_Connectivity".
I also removed all chrome extensions as some other post had mentioned issues with caching and browser extensions- did not help, other browsers also did not work for this policy, which is very weird.
If other policies are being applied then this should also work - logically speaking, but its not !

entry.title: Cost Center and Profit Center Budget
entry.content:
Hello Community,

I'd like to input forecast on GL both in Profit Center and Cost Center, is there a way to do that through a unique input. I assume that KP06 only allows you to input on CC, what about PC?

Thansk for your answer.

 

Regads

entry.title: Re: Basic Withholding Tax (for customers) Process
entry.content:
Hello Anja - Thank you for your reply. The Help articles are very confusing, and I think may contain errors. For example, in the below critical section see the red text.  This must mean "For Accounts Recivable...." is that correct? If you're dealing with customer transactions, my company code, and my accounts payable functions have nothing to do with it.

That is what I am looking to understand... how do I deal with the witholding tax that my customers deduct/withhold when paying me. The customers are outside of my company.  Almost all of the content in the Help is about Accounts Payable and me paying suppliers (or there are errors, if you can please have them corrected).

 

The following differences apply to supplier and customer business transactions.

Supplier Business Transactions

In order to be able to post withholding tax in supplier business transactions, for each withholding tax type, the company code must be authorized to deduct withholding tax, and the supplier must be subject to withholding tax.

Use the Assign Withholding Tax Types to Company Codes configuration item to make the necessary settings.

  1. For Accounts Payable, you specify whether and for how long the company code is authorized to deduct withholding tax for the specified withholding tax type.

  2. Define the following in the supplier master record:

  • Make an entry for each withholding tax type.

  • Define the supplier as subject to withholding tax.

  • If necessary, also define the withholding tax code, type of recipient, withholding tax ID, and details of any withholding tax exemption.

Customer Business Transactions

In order to post withholding tax in customer business transactions, the company code must be subject to withholding tax for the type concerned, and the customer must be authorized to deduct withholding tax.

Use the Assign Withholding Tax Types to Company Codes configuration item to make the necessary settings.

  1. For Accounts Payable, you specify whether and for how long the company code is authorized to deduct withholding tax for the specified withholding tax type.

  2. Define the following in the customer master record:

  • Make an entry for each withholding tax type.

  • Define the customer as being authorized to deduct withholding tax and define the validity period for the authorization.

  • If necessary, also define the withholding tax code and the withholding tax ID.

entry.title: New ILX Custom Banners
entry.content:
Is there a way to edit the config to allow the upload of gif files for the banner? This will allow us to make the page more engaging.

 

Thanks

Graham

entry.title: Longest Query Response Time Since Startup (msec) - Alert summary of BI report
entry.content:
Hi SAP, 

We run the BISupportTool to check our BOBJ production system. In the report, we noticed an alert - Longest Query Response Time Since Startup (msec). 

 

SOMBOBPRDCI.CentralManagementServer

The Longest Query Response Time Since Startup metric provides the longest running query response time in milliseconds since the CMS has been started. A query time of more than 300 seconds could indicate a bottleneck in the Central Management Server process, the CMS database, or the host Operating System. This metric may also indicate a custom application or user query which is not optimized for performance.

For more information, refer to KB Article 1982576.

We want to clearly the meaning of the "query". Does it also include user query/report, like analysis office workbook or webi report? 

357771ms = 375s = 6min is quite common in our system. Most queries with long execution time are scheduled in bobj jobs. Is the threshold value for query execution time of 300 second too low? Or my understanding regarding this is incorrect.

And, as a solution, should not we need to optimize the model in the backend system instead of CMC? 

If it is a standard query, how can we find it in the system? And how can we fine tune the CMS process? (It is hard to tune the DB and OS.)

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Submissions for "SAP HANA Cloud multi-model" developer challenge: Week 2 - Words as Ve
entry.content: This method is working fine for capitals while the previous was failing

entry.title: Custom Business Object - Assign UI App to Developed Business Catalog
entry.content:
Hi,

We have developed several CBO's and then we have created Business Catalogs using developer extensibility.

Is it possible to add these CBOs to the developed Business Catalogs?

Kind regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Custom Business Object - Assign UI App to Developed B...
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

 

To add a Business Catalog to a CBO, you need to use the Custom Catalog Extensions app and this app does not support Business Catalogs created via Developer Extensibility. Custom Catalog Extensions can only be used within Key User Extensibility.

 

Kind regards.

entry.title: Alabama Overtime Reporting for Box 14 of W-2
entry.content:
The Alabama DOR website says:

ALDOR proposes that exempt overtime wages be reported in Box 14 of employees Form W-2 using “EX OT WAGES” as the indicator: for example, EX OT WAGES- $15,250

Is SAP creating a tax form group for this that can be added to box 14 of the W-2 for reporting? This would be related to the solution for Alabama Overtime Tax Exempt earnings that was provided with note 3392866.

Thanks,

Mae

entry.title: Re: New to the SAP Community? A friend of someone already here?
entry.content: Hello I am Sonu I am Happy For Joiin a Sap

entry.title: Cer001 exam
entry.content: How prepare for cer001 exam in PP module. What resources to use? Are Learning journeys enough? What if learning journey does not leads to certification in PP module?

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP ABAP Environment – Setup Data Replication with SLT
entry.content:
Hi @FrankJentsch,

Thanks for your quick reply, much appreciated!

c) Regarding CDS-View changes please let me share that I found a new SNOTE 3298756 - "What's the prerequisite for SLT to replicate CDS views?" I did not try it yet, but this sounds promising in regards of further simplifying data replication.

a) Regarding licensing…I know you are not directly responsible, but please let me express my frustration, it really feels like operating in a minefield while we could build so much great stuff 😒

I agree that the SNOTE reads like licensing most probably is required. May I frankly ask if your reply is based on the same interpretation of the attachment or did you clarify that within SAP? In other words, is there still hope or do we need to take that burden for granted?

It really would be a pity if one follows the recommended replication between onPremise and SAP ABAP Environment, just to find out that the advised way comes with unexpected additional costs (either by acquiring SLT license, complicating architecture by interfacing via SAP HANA (cloud) database or investing more development effort for creating a custom replication).

Sorry if the reply sounds polemic or offending, that certainly is not my intention. Both your excellent blog posts and fast replies are very helpful.

entry.title: Is it possible to add/link Continuous Performance Activities to a previous (active) Goal Plan?
entry.content:
Is it possible to add/link Continuous Performance Activities to a previous (active) Goal Plan? 

We don't have employee central, and it was recently found that the userID coming from our Core HRS was incorrect. We're now receiving the correct userID, but it has created a new record for the employee. I am trying to manually add last year's Continuous Performance Activities/Achievements to his new record, but it does not let me link to last year's Goal Plan. Is there a way for me to do this? 

(I want to link Activities/Achievements to goals in the FY23 Performance Goal Plan)

Thank you!
Geena

In IW32> extras>document for orders> document flow . i want the actual cost and planned cost to be displayed in document flow but unable to find in Document Layout , how to resolve. 

i want the document flow to show Actual cost and Planned cost to each operation/component in it,

entry.title: Increasing number of Compensation Forms routing at once?
entry.content:
Is there a way to increase the number of Compensation Forms that can be routed at once from the Compensation Forms Inbox? 

I believe previously we could select up to 100 forms at once and route forward, but it looks like the latest release has limited the routing to 20 at once. Is there a setting somewhere where we can increase this number?

Thank you,
Geena

entry.title: Which SAP note generates the report "NOTE_3116373"?
entry.content:
The manual activity for note 3116373 informs that it is necessary to execute the report "NOTE_3116373", but it does not inform which note generates this report. I've tried several things but without success.

Please, could anyone tell me which note generates the report "NOTE_3116373"?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Copy Inspection Results - Data selection procedure 300 is not accepted
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

I have a requirement to copy inspection results from one lot to another in sap s/4 hana public edition, where in "selection procedure" - it is restricted to 100 and 200 only i am unable to set it to 300.

How to make selection procedure set to 300?

Thanks,

Sai Bhargav

entry.title: SFSF Records Retention for Personal Information (Employee Data) - Employee Central
entry.content: Hello, I am looking for feedback on the topic of deletion periods for the Employee Central module. Is it possible to store different deletion periods for different personal data in SFSF? Currently, our setup provides for one deletion period per country for all personal data (employee leaves, status: inactive, after x years the data record is deleted).

entry.title: Re: SAP Group Reporting - Different Consolidation Methods...
entry.content:
Hi

Create another version and maintain the group and assign the method accordingly.

As the source for both versions would be from ACDOCA.

It would not be problem. But need to define COI method accordingly and assign to the task.

SVNR

entry.title: Re: In the twilights of a Career Journey
entry.content:
Tammy

You do not know me, I saw you once in my life in a conference in Las Vegas, and at the end of the day, who cares who I am. 

However, I need to say that in life we get to know silent warriors that may not ended up having a statue to honor their achievements, in particular after they are no longer with us.  

You are a professional live well lived. What an example of selfishness, willingness to always assist, and to share your expertise at every professional corner of your life.

I have read and served from some of your blogs, as my area of expertise is way limited compared to all the areas that you have covered for many years.

I hope the reward you receive becomes immense in due time.   Many thanks from this unknown reader,  and I dare to capture the same gratitude from the ones who have taken advantage at every letter you have placed on the web and more. 

Juan

entry.title: Can I adjust the number of digits displayed after decimal point in Performance Forms ratings?
entry.content:
This request is purely for visual consistency: I have a customer who would like to display all ratings/calculated ratings with two digits past the decimal place, even if it would be 2.00. Is this possible to update?

The following picture shows our current settings/configuration, which displays a mix of 1 and 2 digits past the decimal, we would like to display 2 digits past the decimal for all:

Thanks!
Geena

entry.title: Re: WORZONE FIORI APP ONPREMISE - ERROR 403 - Forbidden
entry.content:
I tried to see all the UCON settings.
I followed this tutorial, and everything is ok. https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/cp-launchpad-federation-consumption.html

I saw the SU53 and SM20 logs and there is no error message, i did a trace on cloud connector and there is no errors too.

Only on work zone error logs has this error bellow:

POST request to /bff/ui-trace/v1/trace completed with status 401 Authentication required,"7ba62be5-10ed-425a-4817-416786855aa1","2024-06-19T17:04:10.936Z","ERROR"

entry.title: Re: Bem vindo ao grupo da Comunidade SAP do PORTO (Portugal)
entry.content: O Porto é uma nação!

entry.title: KNVV BO subtype key
entry.content:
Hi Experts,
I am trying to create subtype of KNVV for one of the Opentext '/OTX/**' reciever FM
The change document object used is DEBI with key KUNNR.
However the key of change document object DEBI is incompatible with business object KNVV key.
Is there any best practice solution apart from adding FM in SWED?
OR like any way we could leverage the option of 'Key Converter' Class in SWO1 Tcode?

entry.title: How to capture Manager History in Performance Forms without Employee Central?
entry.content:
We use the "Manager Role" for our Performance Forms Route Map. Is there a best practice or solve for the following scenario?
A manager writes a performance review during the Manager Review step of a Performance Form, but is then terminated before the form gets to Signature stage. The form has been routed to another manager to complete the process including signature, but the form has updated to this new manager's name throughout the form: how can we show the name of the previous (terminated) manager as the person who filled out the ratings?

Route Map:

Advanced Settings related to document transfer:

Settings related to Rating field:

 

Any advice or tips would be appreciated!
Geena

entry.title: Re: Create new report/period in SAP Disclosure Management...
entry.content:
Hi @guido_nachtigall,

Thank you a lot for you time and help at call. I tested the both options and both works well.

1 - Use roll foward and in new period put "concatenate period+company code".

2 - Create two report (datacache and word) in same one and use create report from template (manage report options).

Below I details the second one: Create two report

1- Create report types:

 

 

 

2- Create a report and check with template:

3- Assigned entity to “Group”, and check field “Template for Entities”:

4- Create two chapter (type without content) Datacache and Word:

5- Below chapter Datacache, I created one chapter type standard (Tabela 1) Microsoft Excel with available as datasource (here it had behavior of datacache, correct?):

6- Below chapter Word, I created one chapter type standard (Capitulo 1) Microsoft Word.

7- Create a table inside chapter “Tabela 1“ (datacache behavior).

8- And create a table datalink in word chapter “Capitulo 1” with chapter “Tabela 1” (datacache).

9- I create a new report in "manage reports" using “New from template”, select period and report base and what entity I would like to copy.

10- New report creates:

11- The news reports has the same structure and the name in datalink is correct (Q1 2022/All100/Tabela1):

entry.title: How to call Asynchronous SOAP Web service from ABAP class in S4 HANA public cloud
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have a business requirement to create Main assets in S4 HANA public cloud system(2402), from a custom RAP implementation class.

we have created  the required Communication arrangements in S4 public cloud ( Communication user/system/arrangements) for communication scenario SAP_COM_0563.Outbound service also active in the comm arrangement.

We have tested this SOAP service using SOAP UI tool and its working fine and Assets documents are also getting created in the system.

But We are trying to use the same SOAP API from custom class from eclipse after we creating the service consumption model. and we are getting an error stating "Logical Port does not belong to consumer proxy".

Followed the steps mentioned in this tutorial: https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/abap-environment-soap-web-services..html

SOAP API - used : https://api.sap.com/api/FIXEDASSETCREATEMAIN/overview

Could some one please suggest us how to resolve this, or please suggest the correct approach to be followed to consume the SOAP Web service from custom ABAP class.

entry.title: Re: Adding fields to AMON1 (Alert Monitor)
entry.content: Thanks a lot - works now! Figured it out via the example class (didn't found that one before). Many thanks for the help!

entry.title: Re: Cross Derivation when two type 1 entities and 1 type 4 entity is involved
entry.content: @michael_theis can you please point us to some reference implementation of the access class ?

entry.title: Re: 4E9 Scope item-Error NR/751 in Manage Project Billing...
entry.content:
Hello, 

Is missing the Number Range for Sales 

Number Range No. IR 

IR 0900000000 0999999999

entry.title: Re: Cloud platform connectivity policy template not getting applied
entry.content: I also tried removing that policy, save, refresh, logout, then fresh browser login and added it again - same result !

entry.title: Re: SAP DS - Split a Field at Separator into Multiple Rows
entry.content: I am getting an error at line 26 calling that 'unicode' is not a name. How to solve it?

entry.title: Re: 4E9 Scope item-Error NR/751 in Manage Project Billing...
entry.content: The issue is solved thanks everyone!

entry.title: Re: Change Homepage on SAP Power Apps
entry.content: You are right. I was disabling the build-in navigation. I never used. I did not see that even disabled, this could be fixed there. Thank you!

entry.title: Re: WOCR Packing profile not triggered
entry.content: Hello KarthikCould you find the solution for this error?

entry.title: Temu Coupon Code $100 off {ACT922760} or {ACR690202} for First Order
entry.content:
The good news is that New user can get $100 off for First order with Temu coupon code {ACT922760} or {ACR690202} it is applicable to both new and existing Temu users Temu offers a compelling $100 coupon code {ACT922760} and {ACR690202} for new users and "ACR690202" as existing User To claim this bonus, simply enter the code during checkout and enjoy a $100 discount on your order. To expedite communication, we’ve been tracking common questions and complaints to address them collectively. In this post, I’ll cover several recurring topics to let you know that we’ve heard you and to inform you of our plans moving forward.

Sorting Tag Feeds/Notifications by Content Type
Currently, all tag content is grouped under "posts," which includes both blogs and questions. We recognize the need for members to separate blog content from questions at the tag level. We're working on a solution to provide this option and will share more details as they become available.

Feeds by Publication Date (Not Just Recent Activity)
The "Recent Activity" feeds have caused confusion, with members expecting to see the most recently published posts. To clarify, "Recent Activity" includes any recent interactions with older posts. We understand the desire for chronological feeds of new questions and blog posts and are exploring ways to implement this feature. Updates will follow as we make progress.

Page Views on Blog Content
We acknowledge that blog posts should display the number of views and are working to reinstate this feature. More updates will be provided as we have them.

Blog Formatting Post-Migration
Due to the migration, some blog formatting changed, resulting in issues like excess white space and broken links. Editing old posts to restore previous formatting often worsens the issue and violates community best practices. We advise focusing on creating new content that adheres to current blogging standards, using the "Clear formatting" option when copying text from Word.

Subscriptions Not Triggering Notifications
Some members, including myself, have experienced issues with subscription notifications. While we investigate, you might try unsubscribing and resubscribing to your tags or adjusting your notification settings. We are working on resolving this problem and will update you as more information becomes available.

Character Restrictions in Display Names
We’re aware of complaints regarding character restrictions in display names and are exploring options to extend them. If your display name was truncated during migration, you can change it in the "My content" area of the site. For more details on display names and profile usernames, please refer to my post about profiles post-migration.

We anticipate more updates as we continue to refine the platform post-migration. Please subscribe to the "What's New" section to stay informed as my colleagues and I share further updates. Thank you for your patience and cooperation.

Sorting Tag Feeds/Notifications by Content Type

Feeds by Publication Date (Not Just Recent Activity)

We understand the desire for chronological feeds of new questions and blog posts and are exploring ways to implement this feature. Updates will follow as we make progress.

Page Views on Blog Content
We acknowledge that blog posts should display the number of views and are working to reinstate this feature. More updates will be provided as we have them.

Blog Formatting Post-Migration
Due to the migration, some blog formatting changed, resulting in issues like excess white space and broken links. Editing old posts to restore previous formatting often worsens the issue and violates community best practices. We advise focusing on creating new content that adheres to current blogging standards, using the "Clear formatting" option when copying text from Word.

Subscriptions Not Triggering Notifications
Some members, including myself, have experienced issues with subscription notifications. While we investigate, you might try unsubscribing and resubscribing to your tags or adjusting your notification settings. We are working on resolving this problem and will update you as more information becomes available.

Character Restrictions in Display Names
We’re aware of complaints regarding character restrictions in display names and are exploring options to extend them. If your display name was truncated during migration, you can change it in the "My content" area of the site. For more details on display names and profile usernames, please refer to my post about profiles post-migration.

We anticipate more updates as we continue to refine the platform post-migration. Please subscribe to the "What's New" section to stay informed as my colleagues and I share further updates. Thank you for your patience and cooperation.

entry.title: Re: How to add a level in Concur via BADI_CTE_FIN_COBJ_FILL_LEVEL
entry.content: Thank you for sharing your solution; it was a tremendous help. I was dealing with the exact same situation, needing to add profit center to my Concur export.

entry.title: How to update equipments using the Migration Cockpit app?
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support,

Is it possible to update equipments using the Migration Cockpit? The Migration Object "PM - Equipment" allows us to create equipments in our system, but we'd like to know if there's a way of updating the existing ones using the Migrate Your Data app.

If the update isn't possible, could you explain us why?

Thanks in advance!

Best regards,
Data migration expert team


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to update equipments using the Migration Cockpit...
entry.content:
Dear experts,

While it's possible to create equipments in the system using the Migration Object "PM - Equipment", the Migration Cockpit doesn't support bulk updates to the existing data. The KBA below has relevant information regarding this:

  • 2650201 - Migration Cockpit: How to create/update data records

As it's mentioned by the KBA's Resolution section:

  • (...)The Migration Cockpit is build to initially migrate data. It is not a mass maintenance tool and not built to be used as an interface to permanently upload data into the system.
  • (...)To update/change an existing record you have to check if there is a mass maintenance/processing app available for this object. This is the current behavior.

As such, the standard functionality of the Migration Cockpit is to migrate the initial data required in the system, and thus, use the corresponding Fiori applications and/or R/3 transactions to update and enhance the existing data in the system!

I hope this explains why the app won't allow updates to be made in the existing equipments in your system!

Best regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: KONH - how to identify deleted conditions?
entry.content: KONH does not have position number that KONP has. The same KNUMH in KONP shows one KOPOS deleted while other is not. How to identify KONH condition records that have been flagged for deletion. KONH has condition header number + condition item number combo listed as VAKEY though.

entry.title: SAP Inside Track Porto 2024 - Voluntarios
entry.content:
Aceitam-se voluntarios para o evento SAP Inside Track Porto 2024.

O Evento a realizar em 28 SET 2024, no The Lodge Hotel Porto ( na Ribeira de Gaia), terá tarefas em aberto para voluntarios.

Algumas tarefas em aberto:

  1. Recepção/Cadastramento
  2. Entrega de Brindes
  3. Suporte às apresentações ( controle tempos, recepção digital das apresentações ).
  4. Suporte à equipe de som

 

Interessados podem enviar email para sapinsidetrackporto@gmail.com , ou falar com alguns dos organizadores.

entry.title: connect google drive with S4/HANA version 2020

Hi 

Exist the guide for configure the integration with Google drive in S4/HANA 2020?

Please share with me

Thanks

entry.title: How to Secure Your Cloud Foundry Python Application with XSUAA.
entry.content:
How to Secure Your Cloud Foundry Python Application with XSUAA

Introduction

Securing applications in the cloud is critical to ensure that sensitive data and operations are protected from unauthorized access. SAP Cloud Foundry offers a robust way to handle authentication and authorization using the XSUAA (Extended Services User Account and Authentication) service. By leveraging XSUAA, developers can implement security measures that integrate seamlessly with SAP Cloud Platform, providing OAuth 2.0-based security mechanisms.

In this blog post, I'll walk you through the process of applying XSUAA security to a Python application deployed on Cloud Foundry using the Python Buildpack. Whether you're new to SAP Cloud Platform or looking to secure your existing applications, this guide will help you understand the steps involved and save you time in the process. We'll cover everything from setting up your environment to deploying and testing your secure application, ensuring you have a comprehensive understanding of the entire workflow.

Let's dive in and secure your Python application with XSUAA on Cloud Foundry!

Step-by-Step Guide

1. Setting Up Your Environment

Create a new project directory:

mkdir cf-python-xsuaa
cd cf-python-xsuaa

2. Create hello.py file

Create a new file named hello.py with the following content:

import os
from flask import Flask, request, abort
from cfenv import AppEnv
import jwt
from sap import xssec

app = Flask(__name__)
env = AppEnv()

port = int(os.environ.get('PORT', 3000))
uaa_service = env.get_service(name='xsuaa_service_name').credentials

@app.route('/')
def hello():
     if 'authorization' not in request.headers:
         abort(403)
     access_token = request.headers.get('authorization')[7:]
     print(jwt.decode(access_token, options={"verify_signature": False}))
     security_context = xssec.create_security_context(access_token, uaa_service)
     isAuthorized = security_context.check_scope('uaa.resource')
     print(isAuthorized)
     print(security_context)
     print(access_token)
     if not isAuthorized:
         abort(403)

     return "Hello World"

if __name__ == '__main__':
  app.run(host='0.0.0.0', port=port)

3. Create manifest.yml file

Create a manifest.yml file with the following content:

---
applications:
- name: cf-python-xsuaa
  memory: 128MB
  disk_quota: 256MB
  random-route: true
  buildpack: python_buildpack
  command: python hello.py
  services:
  - xsuaa_service_name

4. Create requirements.txt file

Create a requirements.txt file with the following dependencies:

Flask
gunicorn
cfenv
sap-xssec
PyJWT

5. Create xs-security.json file

Create an xs-security.json file with the following content:

{
    "xsappname": "xsuaa_service_name",
    "tenant-mode": "dedicated"
}

6. Install Dependencies and Run Locally

Set up a virtual environment and install dependencies:

python -m venv venv
.\venv\Scripts\activate
pip install -r requirements.txt

Run the application locally:

python hello.py

7. Deploy to Cloud Foundry

Log in to Cloud Foundry:

cf login

Create the XSUAA service instance:

cf create-service xsuaa application xsuaa_service_name -c xs-security.json

Deploy the application:

cf push

Create a service key for the XSUAA service:

cf create-service-key xsuaa_service_name xsuaa_service_key

Retrieve the service key:

cf service-key xsuaa_service_name xsuaa_service_key

8. Test Your Application with Postman

Generate a token using Postman:

  • Open Postman and create a new POST request to the URL:
  • Example URL: https://abc-interns.authentication.eu12.hana.ondemand.com/oauth/token?grant_type=client_credentials
  • Set the headers:
    • Content-Type: application/json
    • Authorization: Basic Auth with your client_id and client_secret
      • Username: your_client_id
      • Password: your_client_secret

Use the generated token to access your secure endpoint:

  • Create a new GET request in Postman to the URL of your deployed application:
  • Example URL: https://cf-python-xsuaa-agile-cat-cs.cfapps.eu12.hana.ondemand.com/
  • Set the headers:
    • Content-Type: application/json
    • Authorization: Bearer YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN

Replace YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN with the token you obtained from the previous step.

Conclusion

By following these steps, you’ve successfully secured your Python application on Cloud Foundry using XSUAA. This method provides a robust authentication and authorization mechanism, ensuring that your application is protected from unauthorized access.

Additional Resources

  • SAP Cloud Platform XSUAA Documentation
  • Cloud Foundry Documentation
  • Python Buildpack Documentation

Call to Action

Try securing your applications and help others also in comments and post your experiences in SAP Community.

Thanks and regards,

Harsh Tirhekar

entry.title: Re: Call API on Presentation Server using CL_HTTP_CLIENT
entry.content: create_by_destination

entry.title: Re: SAP DS - Split a Field at Separator into Multiple Rows
entry.content: @Saran07 how to convert Python 2 unicode() function into correct Python 3.x syntax - Stack Overflow

entry.title: Is there any difference in the APIs between S/4HANA Cloud and S/4HANA onPremise?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are using API to integrate with S/4HANA Cloud. We also want to use the same code to support S/4HANA onPremise. So here we want to confirm with you, is there any difference in the APIs between Cloud and On-Prem?

Thanks.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Is there any difference in the APIs between S/4HANA C...
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

 

In general, yes, there can be differences between S4/HANA onPremise and cloud.

SAP tries to keep the API interfaces compatible between cloud and onPremise. But cloud releases will get new fields, operations etc. in the APIs in shorter release cycles than onPremise 2023.

So please check and compare the API hub  https://api.sap.com/products/SAPS4HANACloud/overview for public cloud and https://api.sap.com/products/SAPS4HANACloudPrivateEdition/overview for onPremise.

 

Kind regards.

entry.title: Custom CDS view authorizations
entry.content:
Hello SAP Team,

How can we set authorization to custom CDS views created via app  “Custom CDS Views” in SAP public cloud edition?

Thanks.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Custom CDS view authorizations
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

As per Before Getting Started | SAP Help Portal > Access Protection in Custom CDS Views: A custom CDS view inherits its protection exclusively from its primary data source.

Therefore, it is not possible to set specific authorizations but the ones from the primary data source are used.

 

Kind regards.

entry.title: Re: Inventory Management in BW/4HANA
entry.content:
Hi Lorenz,

I have not seen any Record type as 9.

I tried looking for the flow you have mentioned as I did not see record type 9 there.

Please let me know if your issue is solved or you find answer for you question on the same.

 

BR 

Prem Shanker

entry.title: Re: Close Production Order impossible with DI API on 9.1
entry.content: https://me.sap.com/notes/3357754

entry.title: Re: ImportDeterminationService in SAP Business One SDK
entry.content: Thanks a lot for the post! Is it the same process for CFDI protocol?

entry.title: Temu Discount Code {ACT922760} and {ACR690202} Get up to 95% Off All Users
entry.content:
The good news is that New user can get $100 off for First order with Temu coupon code {ACT922760} or {ACR690202} it is applicable to both new and existing Temu users Temu offers a compelling $100 coupon code {ACT922760} and {ACR690202} for new users and "ACR690202" as existing User To claim this bonus, simply enter the code during checkout and enjoy a $100 discount on your order. To expedite communication, we’ve been tracking common questions and complaints to address them collectively. In this post, I’ll cover several recurring topics to let you know that we’ve heard you and to inform you of our plans moving forward.

Sorting Tag Feeds/Notifications by Content Type
Currently, all tag content is grouped under "posts," which includes both blogs and questions. We recognize the need for members to separate blog content from questions at the tag level. We're working on a solution to provide this option and will share more details as they become available.

Feeds by Publication Date (Not Just Recent Activity)
The "Recent Activity" feeds have caused confusion, with members expecting to see the most recently published posts. To clarify, "Recent Activity" includes any recent interactions with older posts. We understand the desire for chronological feeds of new questions and blog posts and are exploring ways to implement this feature. Updates will follow as we make progress.

Page Views on Blog Content
We acknowledge that blog posts should display the number of views and are working to reinstate this feature. More updates will be provided as we have them.

Blog Formatting Post-Migration
Due to the migration, some blog formatting changed, resulting in issues like excess white space and broken links. Editing old posts to restore previous formatting often worsens the issue and violates community best practices. We advise focusing on creating new content that adheres to current blogging standards, using the "Clear formatting" option when copying text from Word.

Subscriptions Not Triggering Notifications
Some members, including myself, have experienced issues with subscription notifications. While we investigate, you might try unsubscribing and resubscribing to your tags or adjusting your notification settings. We are working on resolving this problem and will update you as more information becomes available.

Character Restrictions in Display Names
We’re aware of complaints regarding character restrictions in display names and are exploring options to extend them. If your display name was truncated during migration, you can change it in the "My content" area of the site. For more details on display names and profile usernames, please refer to my post about profiles post-migration.

We anticipate more updates as we continue to refine the platform post-migration. Please subscribe to the "What's New" section to stay informed as my colleagues and I share further updates. Thank you for your patience and cooperation.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)

entry.title: Re: Testing SAP Build Process Automation task UI in SAP Business Application Studio
entry.content:
Hi @sdeissenboeck,

Thanks for your comment and trying out this solution.

I have created a repository which contains the wrapper and a sample task UI. You can simply clone it, install dependencies for each project, and start the task UI by `npm start`.

entry.title: How to transport content version from our dev/test system to the production system
entry.content:
Hi team,
for our production system, I am not able to assign any template for new application or the existing one available, due to the content version on our production being lower than our development. How do we transport this to our production system? 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to transport content version from our dev/test sy...
entry.content:
Hi team,

To transport your content version from your dev/test system to your production system:

  1. Go to transaction solman_setup
  2. Select Application Operations -> System Monitoring
  3. Go to step 4 Template Maintenance 
  4. Select the "Generate Request" button
  5. In the new window, select "Applied Content Version", then "Generate Request"

Thanks & regards,

Conor, 

SAP Support

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Platform Integration - Standard Content Update Governance
entry.content: Is there any email notification sent to customers (Integration suite admin) for these updates to standard integration packages?

entry.title: Re: SAP BW Bridge InfoObject Hierarchy Re-Use in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Just a quick hint from my side:

I guess you have also shell-converted ADSOs into BW bridge. If you run entity import for one of the ADSOs, you should get a better idea how to work with dimensions.

entry.title: Re: SAP BW Bridge InfoObject Hierarchy Re-Use in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Just a quick hint from my side:

I guess you have also shell-converted ADSOs into BW bridge. If you run entity import for one of the ADSOs, you should get a better idea how to work with dimensions.

entry.title: Translate API call to API expression
entry.content:
Hi all

We using Successfactor to Entra ID provisioning, and need to add an attribute that's not in the default mapping range. I've added some changes to advanced attribute mapping or directly to schema json, in this list.

the API call is this: 
/odata/v2/PerPhone?$select=countryCodeNav/externalCode,isPrimary,personIdExternal,phoneNumber,phoneType,phoneTypeNav/externalCode&$expand=countryCodeNav,phoneTypeNav

any type of documentation for this or any ideas to help med align this? Translating API CALL to API Expression

entry.title: Re: What’s New for SAP Build Apps – Mobile Authentication
entry.content:
Hello, I am confused about a use case, I am interested in knowing if it is viable cost/benefit to solve it through BuildApps, since it is about creating an APP for anonymous users, and in that sense, what I understand is that each anonymous user who uses the app must be licensed, counted as an ActiveUser and that increases the cost exponentially, is this assessment correct? Is there a way to solve this use case with buildapps without that subscription impact (ActiveUsers)?

I appreciate your help.
